tasks.label: git-commit-push-pr
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'feat(layer1+2): Foundation tasks 044/045/047/046 + stability refactor task-017' && git push origin copilot/feattask-046-multi-farm-clean && gh pr create --title 'feat(layer1+2): Foundation + Stability Layer' --body 'Layer 1: Tasks 044, 045, 046, 047 + Layer 2: Task 017 (DeleteConfirmButton + TableSkeleton)' --base main --head copilot/feattask-046-multi-farm-clean
